summary: A Forbes profile of Bumble founder Whitney Wolfe Herd, detailing her net worth, career milestones, and a brief quote on female empowerment in business. The source primarily consists of biographical metadata and links to related articles.

principles.statement: Women deserve equal representation and opportunity in business.
principles.rationale: Historically male-dominated spaces and rituals in the business world must evolve to include women.
principles.source_quote: The power lunch is no longer just for men. We all deserve a seat at the table.

signature_quotes.text: The power lunch is no longer just for men. We all deserve a seat at the table.
signature_quotes.context: Featured in the 'In Their Own Words' section of her Forbes profile.
